title: Antitrust Laws: What is the main objective of antitrust laws in the...
summary: Identify the primary objective of antitrust laws in maintaining market competition during mergers.
prompt: What is the main objective of antitrust laws in the context of mergers?

options.text: Antitrust laws aim to prevent monopolistic practices and maintain competition

solution: Antitrust laws aim to prevent monopolistic practices and maintain competition within markets, particularly regarding mergers.
